{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20567_1
|class_id=20567
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=collection@20567_2
|fame=16
|art=13
|fth=17
|civ=28
|tech=16
|ss1=prop@62416_2<br>Per Civilization Stele deciphered, Snail RUSH +20<br>Civilization Steles deciphered: 3/3
|ss2=prop@62416_2<br>Per Civilization Stele deciphered, Snail RUSH +40<br>Civilization Steles deciphered: 3/3
|ss3=prop@62416_2<br>Per Civilization Stele deciphered, Snail RUSH +60<br>Civilization Steles deciphered: 3/3
|ss4=prop@62416_2<br>Per Civilization Stele deciphered, Snail RUSH +60<br>Civilization Steles deciphered: 3/3
|ss7=prop@62416_2<br>Per Civilization Stele deciphered, Snail RUSH +60<br>Civilization Steles deciphered: 3/3<br> (Awakened)
}}
